overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring Lizzie's Bar, a neon-lit cyberpunk nightclub. The player walks from the entrance bar through a beaded curtain into a spacious dance floor area with pink and blue neon lighting, then moves to a back lounge featuring a large skull mural and circular fire pits where patrons socialize.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance to Lizzie's Bar, featuring a prominent pink neon sign and a long bar counter. The camera moves past the bartender and a customer, then passes through a beaded curtain divider that separates the entrance from the main club area, transitioning from the intimate bar space into the larger venue.

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded dance floor, navigating between dancing patrons and observing the neon-lit surroundings

woman in shorts and jacket dancing near the illuminated stairs

entered.detail: large open dance area with reflective dark flooring
second level balcony with railings overlooking the dance floor
tall vertical red neon light strips on the back wall
elevated DJ station with equipment and lighting
stairs with illuminated pink LED edges

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the curtain, the scene opens into a spacious dance floor bathed in pink and blue neon light. The camera moves through scattered crowds of dancing patrons, passing by an illuminated staircase and heading toward the back of the club where vertical red neon pillars mark the far wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate lounge area with skull mural and circular fire pits

events.description: exiting the lounge area back toward the main dance floor

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area, observing the mural and patrons seated around fire pits, then turning back toward the main floor

notable_agents.action: patron in red jacket sitting on couch near the mural
group of people socializing around the circular fire pit

entered.detail: large wall mural featuring stylized skulls and faces in purple and pink tones
round elevated fire pit with flames surrounded by seating
curved couches and chairs arranged around tables

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a more intimate lounge area featuring a prominent skull mural on the left wall and circular fire pits with patrons seated around them. After observing the scene, the camera turns and exits back toward the main dance floor, with the mural passing from the far left to near left as the perspective shifts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate entrance of Lizzie's Bar into a sprawling, neon-lit nightclub and its secluded lounge. It begins at a long bar counter beneath a prominent pink neon sign, moving past the bartender and through a beaded curtain divider. As the camera emerges from the curtain, the space expands into a spacious dance floor bathed in pink and blue light, weaving through crowds of patrons and passing an illuminated staircase toward vertical red neon pillars. The scene then shifts into a more intimate lounge area characterized by a large skull mural and circular fire pits where patrons socialize. Finally, the camera turns away from the lounge and retreats back toward the main dance floor, with the mural sliding across the peripheral vision as the perspective shifts.
